personal.name: Víctor Alcázar
personal.title: DevOps & AI Engineer
personal.summary:
Detail-oriented DevOps & AI Engineer with over 8 years of enterprise experience spanning cloud infrastructure, backend services, and modern web applications.
Proven track record of architecting scalable DevOps and microservices systems, and leading technical initiatives for global entities such as Mercedes-Benz and Zurich Insurance Group.
Specializes in C#, React, Java, Azure, and integrating state-of-the-art technologies like Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI into production architectures.
Dedicated to clean code, Agile methodologies, and Continuous Integration / Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipelines.

certifications: Introduction to Microsoft Azure Cloud Services
Azure DevOps: Introduction to CI/CD with Visual Studio

awards.title: Logitech Main Prize – START Hack
awards.description: Awarded for Best VR Project utilizing Oculus Rift

awards.title: Smart People with Smart Ideas International Award
awards.description: €2,000 innovation grant recipient awarded by Lleida City Council

awards.title: Full Academic Scholarship to UPC
awards.description: Awarded for graduating Valedictorian / Top of Class with 9.15 GPA

experience.description:
• Spearheaded an innovative AI initiative for Mercedes-Benz, leading the technical architecture and prototype development.
• Restructured and modernized enterprise documentation systems, utilizing Large Language Models (LLMs) and advanced prompt engineering.
• Deployed scalable Generative AI and Python-based solutions via Docker and Kubernetes.

• Built and maintained 2 internal applications and tools utilizing React and TypeScript / JavaScript, accelerating daily operational workflows for over 100 end-users.
• Acted as an ITIL Change Manager for the Service Management team alongside the Development team.
• Directed deployment lifecycles, delivered operational infrastructure, and helped reduced resolving times for end-user support tickets.

• Engineered gamified Augmented Reality / Virtual Reality (AR/VR) test simulations designed to build sophisticated psychological profiles of consumers.
• Developed localized, next-generation immersive experiences for the high-end retail MENA market using Unity and C#.
• Integrated early-stage AI concepts to tailor luxury buyer journeys, improving consumer engagement metrics.

• Developed and maintained scalable backend services as an external consultant for Mercedes-Benz, improving API capabilities and test coverage.
• Operated in a modern DevOps and microservices architecture utilizing Java, Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins.
• Managed comprehensive application logging and monitoring via the ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana).

• Developed robust full-stack web applications built with a .NET, MongoDB, AngularJS, Azure, and SQL-based technology stack.
• Designed scalable cross-platform APIs, optimizing query response rates for client data retrieval, and managing CI/CD pipelines.

• Maintained the core editorial publishing software utilized by 50+ sports journalists at Mundo Deportivo (Grupo Godó).
• Engineered backend components in a high-traffic media architecture utilizing Java 7, Apache Velocity, and EidosMedia Méthode.
• Managed continuous integration workflows using Jenkins, Jira, and Gitlab.

• Expanded existing functionalities of Tiendeo's core API using C# and Postman, increasing analytics data coverage.
• Created the foundational architecture for a new PDF-parsing and uploading service utilized by the product team.
• Developed a custom Visual Studio extension using C# to accelerate internal developer workflows.
